title: FX Notes
body_text:
FX Notes
1	Introduction to FX Notes
1.1	Overview of FX Notes
FX Notes allows authorized users to buy and sell foreign currency bank notes through a partnership between Central 1 and Globex 2000. Coins are not available. Authorized users access the application via Central 1âs Client Centre.
Contact Central 1 Client Support Services to enroll in FX Notes.
Canadian bank notes arenât available through FX Notes. For procedures on ordering and returning Canadian bank notes, see the following:
BC and Ontario financial institutions can refer to the Currency Ordering and Precious Metals Part.
Non-member financial institutions must refer to their internal procedures.

Note:	The Operations Manual Program is available on a subscription basis. For more information about the Program, please contact Product Compliance & Design at
manuals@central1.com
or speak with your Central 1 Account Executive.
1.2	FX Notes Availability and Currency Exchange Rates
FX Notes is available daily from 7:30 am â 9 pm ET. The exchange rates are live. If you want to use a daily rate, you can download a rates page, but it is your responsibility to manage any risk via your organizationâs spreads as the rate at the time of order will be honoured. See Section 7.1, Accessing the Retail Rate Modifiers Page, for more information.
Important:
Currency orders placed after 3 pm ET (12 pm PT) will be processed the next day.
